feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to parse an Employee Central ODATA into ABAP table
entry.content:
I can retrieve a SuccessFactors Employee Central ODATA file, for example ODATA BenefitEnrollment, using an ABAP program.  But I'm unsure about how to parse the data into an internal table with the retrieved data columns and values.  Does someone have an example ABAP program on how to achieve this?

Thanks,

Kenneth

entry.title: ST05 Error "For SQL Statements with an ITAB, the Planviz is not supported"
entry.content:
Hi All,
We wanted to analyze the performance of below select query and we are on S4HANA OP2020 system.

SELECT
a~matnr,
a~bwkey,
a~bwtar,
a~lbkum,
a~salk3,
a~verpr,
a~zkprs,
a~timestamp
FROM mbew AS a
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT matnr, werks FROM @LT_material AS b WHERE matnr = a~matnr ) AND bwkey IN @LT_t001w_rg AND bwtar IN @LT_bwtar
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_mbew_tabn5).

We captured ST05 trace for above SELECT query also and when we are trying to download the plan viz file it gives error like "For SQL Statements with an ITAB, the Planviz is not supported"(PFB screenshot).

It is happening because we are using @LT_material internal table in subquery.We also tried with innerjoin to @LT_material and it give same error.  So how in such cases we can get planviz file? 
Any suggestions?

 



Regards,
Prince

entry.title: how to fetch serial number in vl02n
entry.content:
hi experts.

In VL02N, you can assign a serial number in the extra —> serial number field. If someone writes a new serial number, it’s assigned to that material in that outbound. I want to fetch that and check it. How can I do that? I have tried many ways, but I can’t fetch that specific serial number under the save or PGI button for the first time.

it have to save for the first time then i can fetch it , but i want it before save for the first time.

entry.title: Payment terms returns to 0000 after pressing Enter in FB01
entry.content: I'm having issues in FB01. I tried to enter the payment terms 0101 but after pressing enter, it will return to 0000. How do I debug it?

entry.title: ABAP CDS extractor on NSDM_E_MCHBH (replacement of MCHBH) in not getting delta in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created a ABAP CDS delta extractor on NSDM_E_MCHBH (replacement of MCHBH) using CDC. SAP recommends to use replacement if available. When the extractor is used in DataSphere Replication flow, the delta load is failing. 

Error - CDS view is Inconsistent and Definition of the view is too complex for automatic CDC

Note - We are getting warning "Definition of view is too complex for automatic CDS" and "Data extraction of CDS entity not possible" in ABAP perspective. We ignored the warning as it was for other extractor's as well and they are fine.

Note , even extractor on MCHBH we faced the same issue.

Please let me know how we can get delta from table MCHBH using ABAP CDS view extractor.

Thanks,

entry.title: show user name in material change log
entry.content:
in mm03, we can see who changed the material (mm03->environment menu->display changes). it's a user id there. How can I display user name in the alv report? what way should I use to enhance?

Thanks

entry.title: Pick value from segments based on qualifier in AIF
entry.content:
Hello,
I have to update index table for AIF.
In my case I have multiple(4 records) values in same segments and it is updating index table with 1st segment only. But I want to pick value for 3rd record (0080293).

I have implemented a note 3416275 and maintained it as below.

Here, I want to update index table with sales organization for qualifier '008' which is at 3rd place.
Could you please guide and help here.
Thanks in advance !

entry.title: Code completion not working in Eclipse for CDS Built-in functions
entry.content: Hi. Good day. When using CDS built-in functions like decimal_shift, unit_conversion etc., code completion is not working in Eclipse. I tried selecting the signature by mouse click and also by Shift + Enter.

entry.title: Email for Contact Person list uibb
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a scenario as below and request to guide me on the same.

User is trying to create the CR for the MDG-C.

We have custom list uibb for contact person inturn it is allowed to feed the details in the form uibb.

In the form uibb, we add the email id and when we navigate to list uibb, the email id value disappears.

Request to guide me on the same.

Option tried as below.

1. We have checked the feeder class of the list uibb IF_FPM_GUIBB_LIST~GET_DATA, email flows in the CT_DATA but not appearing in the list uibb

Attached the screens for form and list uibb, request to guide me on the same. Thanks.

2. We have checked the value of ev_data_changed  which is true.

3. Feeder class is created on top of super class CL_BS_BP_GUIBB_RELATIONS

form uibb :

list uibb :

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: How to edit Standard form layout
entry.content: How to edit the Fico Sapscript  Standard form Layout. The client requirement is to keep table. Is it possible to edit the standard form to get the data in the form of table format. The form is F140_INT_DOCU_01. I Copied from client and named it as ZF140_INT_DOCU_0. After that i tried but i am not getting the table format. can anyone help me to solve this...

entry.title: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound Delivery Directly in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I'm trying to create inbound deliveries directly in our decentralized SAP EWM system without a connected SAP ERP. I've already referred to the following threads on the forum, but they haven't provided a solution:

  • How to create Inbound Delivery through FM/BAPI just in the EWM system?
  • Creation of Inbound delivery in EWM - SAP Community

My specific requirement is to create inbound deliveries programmatically or via a batch job based on external data stored in our custom tables.

I'm wondering if there are any standard ABAP classes, Function Modules (FM), or BAPIs available in SAP EWM that can be used to achieve this.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Add defaulted 2nd line item to invoice creation during run time
entry.content:
Hi All,

I got a requirement to add defaulted line item for all invoice during creation, this requirement is something like if there is invoice for purchasing of TV, during invoice creation INSTALLATION service should be added as a 2nd line item by default during invoice creation before save.

This requirement has to be done in ECC, kindly suggest the solutions

Thanks

Udaykiran

entry.title: Copy file form fileserver with FTP with umlaut in file name
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to copy .pdf files with an umlaut in the file name via FTP?

Copying via FTP with the function module FTP_COMMAND generally works, only for files with an umlaut (ä,ö,ü) the following message appears:

"451 No mapping for the Unicode character exists in the target multi-byte code page.

Messagenumber. 26000"

The FTP transfer is implemented as follows (excerpt from coding):

CALL FUNCTION 'FTP_CONNECT'.....

    CONCATENATE 'set passive on' ' ' INTO lv_ftpcom SEPARATED BY ' '.
    CALL FUNCTION 'FTP_COMMAND'
         EXPORTING: handle     = lv_handle
                    command    = lv_ftpcom
         TABLES:    data       = lt_ftp_result
         EXCEPTIONS: data_error = 1
                     OTHERS     = 2.

    CONCATENATE 'binary' ' ' INTO lv_ftpcom SEPARATED BY ' '.
    CALL FUNCTION 'FTP_COMMAND'
         EXPORTING: handle     = lv_handle
                    command    = lv_ftpcom
         TABLES:    data       = lv_ftp_result
         EXCEPTIONS: data_error = 1
                     OTHERS     = 2.

Thank you.

entry.title: Custom Date Input Field in Manage Customer Line Items App
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

 

As I added the date custom field in Manage Customer Line Items App and it added to the filterbar properly by extending the standard OData service FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS.

 

But I want to achieve this date custom field UI behavior like other existing date field UI behavior. 

For example, when we select the date in the standard field "Open on Key Date", we can select Date, Today, Yesterday, Tomorrow etc. 

 

 How can we achieve the same in the custom date field?

 

Regards,

Tamilselvan

entry.title: How to Integrate two different Custom Api in eclipse?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to use Custom API : I_BusinessPartnerTP_3 / I_CRDTMBUSINESSPARTNERTP to create Business Partner and Credit Data.

How to build classes to integrate them in eclipse? 

When I update CreditLimitAmount Field, I want to get the information that CreditSegment was created.

If it wasn't created, I should use Create CreditSegment Field first.

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: How to Import an UBL XSD Structure in SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

I have a request to transform an invoice into an XML file; however, this XML must comply with the UBL standard. I understand that with the transaction STRANS I can include a Transformation to fill a structure automatically, nevertheless, When I see the UBL XSD Schema, to create a structure manually on the Tcode SE11, seems to be a wrong approach. Does anyone know a way to include or upload the UBL XSD Schema for the automatic creation of the structure in the DDIC ? If someone can send me a step by step, or any Information, it will be very appreciated. 

 

In some threads I red that with Eclipse is also possible, unfortunately I'm not familiarized with Eclipse 😞 

 

Thanks a lot in advance,

Lee

entry.title: Connect SAP on premise system with Google Drive so that we can call API's using ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have some files stored in a google drive and I want to access these files from SAP using ABAP. I have created the client id and secret and also tested the authentication token with postman and it seems to be working fine in Postman. Now my question is that how to call the google drive API like "https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files" from SAP using ABAP. Also how to get the auth token.

I have found one resource which talks about the same but I am not able to achieve it as SAP blocks HTTPS communication with google without SSL and we don't have the signed SSL certificate for it. Also do I need ABAP SDK for google cloud for achieving this?

Resource -> https://cloud.google.com/solutions/sap/docs/abap-sdk/on-premises-or-any-cloud/latest/authentication-oauth-client-credentials

Is there any way to communicate without SSL or by using HTTP rather than HTTPS?

Kindly help with this.

entry.title: which minimum netweaver release for CDS views
entry.content:
Hi,

which netweaver version and sp is needed to create CDS views?

We are on 7.4 and SP 25 ( 12/2020 ), Oracle 19.21.0.0.0 DB

When I start eclipse and try to create a new ABAP object,

Core Data Services is not shown.

Holger

entry.title: ABAP download files via saprouter
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I cannot find much information on the topic. I want my ABAP program to download a file from the internet, but the server does not have internet access, except via the saprouter.

Do I have to make a connecton in SM59, and use it somehow in ABAP? (smth. like SAP-SUPPORT_NOTE_DOWNLOAD)
Or set up a proxy, so that ABAP functions can use the HTTP proxy?
Or something else?

Regards, Ilian

entry.title: How can I add a "floating field" to the table?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

My friends who developed before me added text fields / floating fields ({Packing}, {FKIMG}, {TOT_VAL}, {WAERK}) to the table. AdobeForms recognized these added floating fields.

 



Similarly, when I want to add a floating field ({ZMAN_C}) to the table, it does not accept it.

 

How can I add a "floating field" to the table? Can you help?

 

Thanks.
